lore.english:
Taimanin. Though she hails from a branch of the Fuuma household, she has never been involved in the clan's internal power struggles and has remained neutral, even during Danjo's rebellion. Other Taimanins tend to keep their distance from her due to her abilities and lineage, but she pays no attention to them and only focuses on hunting down demons.

She is a Taimanin who possesses the Evil Eye "Deadly Tear" in her right eye, which tears open wounds. When someone with an existing injury meets her gaze, they fall under a powerful illusion where even a minor wound feels like a fatal wound, where their innards are ripped out. The body, reacting to this overwhelming sensation, turns what was once a superficial cut into a life-threatening injury.

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Double Slash[-]
skills.description:
Swings a sword in an X shape and slashes the enemy 2 times.
Target hit is inflicted with [&Color_Cyan]([V3:450102]%)[-] [&Bleeding] at a [&Color_Cyan][R:450102]%[-] chance.
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:450102] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Chasing Slash[-]
skills.description:
Swings a sword left and right to attack the enemy 4 times.
If the target has [&Bleeding] on [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast], inflicts [&Color_Cyan]([V3:450202]%)[-] [&Weaken].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:450202] turn(s)
Gains [&Color_Cyan]([V3:450203]%)[-] [&CriRateUp] [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionAfter]. 
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:450203] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Death Splinter: Afterlife[-]
skills.description:
Uses quick-draw technique to slash [&Common_Word_Skill_EnemyAll] horizontally.
When using the skill, increases [&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalRate] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:450302]%)[-].
If the target has 3 or more [&DeBuff]s, increases [&Common_Word_Skill_CriticalDamage] by [&Color_Cyan]([V3:450303]%)[-].
On the [&Common_Word_Skill_ActionLast], performs a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:450304]%)[-][&Bleeding] [&Common_Word_Skill_DotBuffBurst] attack.
After the [&Common_Word_Skill_DotBuffBurst] attack, inflicts the target with a [&Color_Cyan]([V3:450305]%)[-] [&Bleeding].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:450305] turn(s)
skills.description_readable:

After the [&Common_Word_Skill_DotBuffBurst] attack, inflicts the target with a ([V3:450305]%) [&Bleeding].
[&Common_Word_Skill_ValueTurn]: [V2:450305] turn(s)

skills.name: [&Color_Cyan]Death Splinter[-]
skills.description:
[&Common_Word_Skill_Damage] increases by [&Color_Cyan][V3:450401]%[-] of the target's lost [&HP].
If the target [&HP] is less than [&Color_Cyan]50%[-], the effect is doubled.
